zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Talley於1651年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓時，他的父親Richard Talley24歲，母親Patience Pope23歲。他於1684年8月5日與Sarah Blake在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛維爾 米爾斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1717年12月8日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Talley于1651年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓时，他的父亲Richard Talley24岁，母亲Patience Pope23岁。他于1684年8月5日与Sarah Blake在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛維爾 米爾斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1717年12月8日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Talley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Tolley  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of the places in northern France named Tailly (Somme, Ardennes). It is uncertain that this surname survived into modern times.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Taithligh ‘descendant of Taithleach’, a byname or personal name meaning ‘peaceable’. This surname is now very rare in Ireland.

variants.name: Tally
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Talley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tallie
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Talley  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland. In the US, it is found mainly among African Americans.

variants.name: Talty
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tailtigh ‘descendant of Tailteach’, a personal name which Woulfe believes to be a variant of Taithleach, a byname or personal name meaning ‘peaceable’ (see Talley ).

variants.name: Tolley
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Toli (Old Norse Tóli, a particularly East Scandinavian pet form of names in Thórr ‘the god Thor’ + an element beginning with l-).
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Russian Telyatev: nickname or metonymic occupational name derived from telyata ‘calves’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Talley was born in 1651, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Richard Talley, was 24 and his mother, Patience Pope, was 23. He married Sarah Blake on 5 August 1684, in Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 December 1717, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Talley est né en 1651, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Talley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Patience Pope, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Blake le 5 août 1684, à Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1717, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Talley 1651 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Talley 24 und seine Mutter Patience Pope 23. Er hat am 5. August 1684 in Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Blake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1717 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Talley è nato il nel 1651 nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Richard Talley, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Patience Pope, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Blake il 5 agosto 1684, nel Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 dicembre 1717, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Talleyが1651年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで生まれた時，父Richard Talleyは24歳，母Patience Popeは23歳であった。1684年8月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロウエル ミルズでSarah Blakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1717年12月8日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.Old Sexton Bills, Massachusetts, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuse: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 로어 미스
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Talley(이)가 1651년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Talley(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Patience Pope(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1684년 8월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 로어 미스에서 Sarah Blake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1717년 12월 8일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Talley nasceu em 1651, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Talley, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Patience Pope, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Blake em 5 de agosto de 1684, em Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1717, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuse: лоуир миллс, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Talley родился в 1651 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Richard Talley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Patience Pope, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Blake 5 августа 1684 г. в местности лоуир миллс, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 декабря 1717 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Talley nació en 1651, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Talley, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Patience Pope, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sarah Blake el 5 de agosto de 1684, en Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1717, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
